title: Optimise++
description: Optimise++ is a recreation of Optimise+ with a few more QOL features
body:
# Optimise++

### This, is Optimise++

The newest of the Optimise series. Building upon the incredible performance of Optimise+, Optimise++ delivers exceptional framerate, no matter the scenario.

With new mods added such as Zoom and Dynamic lights, as well as many others, Optimise++ will bring together all your favourite features into one, light Modpack.
